seo.meta_description: PR agencies: turn your clients' conference appearances into months of content. Talk Commerce records the interviews. Content Cucumber writes the articles, case studies, and social posts.
seo.og_description: Your clients are already at the conference. We turn their booth presence into podcast episodes, blog articles, case studies, and social content. White-label available.

form.subtitle: Tell us a bit about your agency and we'll set up a quick call.
form.trust_text: 40+ human writers. 500+ podcast episodes. Trusted by agencies.

thankyou.title: Thanks for reaching out.
thankyou.text: We'll be in touch shortly to schedule a call. Looking forward to learning about your clients.

data.title:
Your clients are at the conference.
We turn that into content.
paragraphs: Your clients are already spending on the booth, the travel, and the team. Talk Commerce records professional interviews on-site. Content Cucumber's writers turn those conversations into blog articles, case studies, social posts, and SEO content.
Three packages your clients can choose from. White-label available. No contracts, no minimums. See the full interview packages.

data.title: Packages for Your Clients
data.subtitle: Every package includes a professional on-camera interview at the conference. Higher tiers add written content from Content Cucumber's team. White-label on all tiers.

items.name: Spotlight
items.target: A quick, professional interview that gets your client on the Talk Commerce podcast. You deliver the clips to your client.

form_modal.heading: Book a Free Interview for Your Client
form_modal.subtitle: Tell us which event and which client. We'll confirm the slot.

outcomes: Shareable video clip for your client's channels

items.name: Deep Dive
items.target: A full-length conversation your client can use across every channel. You get the footage, they get the exposure.

form_modal.heading: Book a Deep Dive for Your Client
form_modal.subtitle: 15-minute in-depth interview. $100 per session.

outcomes: Multiple edited clips for social media
Raw footage delivered to your agency

items.name: Full Content Package
items.target: One interview becomes a complete content library. Talk Commerce records. Content Cucumber writes. You deliver it all under your brand.

form_modal.heading: Let's Scope Your Client's Package
form_modal.subtitle: Tell us about the event and your client's goals. We'll schedule a quick call.

outcomes: Case study written by Content Cucumber
Social media content calendar with clips
All content white-labeled to your agency

data.title: How It Works for Agencies
data.subtitle: You book interviews for your clients. We handle everything else.

steps.title: Pick Packages for Your Clients
steps.text: Choose Spotlight (free), Deep Dive ($100), or Full Content Package (custom) for each client attending the conference. Fill out the form and we confirm the slots.

steps.title: We Show Up at Their Booth
steps.text: Talk Commerce arrives with pro gear and guides a natural, relaxed conversation. No scripts needed. Your client talks about what they know.

steps.title: Content Delivered to Your Agency
steps.text: Video clips within two weeks. For Full Content packages, Content Cucumber's writers produce articles, case studies, and social content. All white-labeled. You deliver it to your client.

items.question: Is everything white-labeled?
items.answer: Yes. All tiers. Video clips, articles, case studies, social content. Delivered to your agency. You deliver to your client under your brand. We stay behind the scenes.

items.question: Can I book interviews for multiple clients at the same event?
items.answer: Yes. We limit to 8 total interview slots per event, but you can book several for different clients. Mix and match packages. One agency booking multiple clients is common.

items.question: How does billing work for agencies?
items.answer: Spotlight interviews are free. Deep Dive is $100 per interview, billed to your agency. Full Content Packages are custom-quoted based on scope. No contracts, no minimums, no recurring fees.

items.question: What's the turnaround?
items.answer: Video clips and published episodes within two weeks of the event. Written content (blog articles, case studies) within three weeks. Rush delivery available.

items.question: What are Content Cucumber and Talk Commerce?
items.answer: Content Cucumber is a content creation agency with 40+ human writers specializing in ecommerce. Talk Commerce is a podcast and media platform with 500+ episodes. Talk Commerce records the interview. Content Cucumber turns it into written content. One relationship, a full content pipeline for your clients.

data.title: Book interviews for your clients.
data.text: 8 slots per event. Tell us which conference your clients are attending and which packages you want. We handle the rest.
